scripts.build: node ./scripts/prebuild.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/bundle-content-script.js && node ./scripts/build-extension.js
scripts.package: node ./scripts/prebuild.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=production tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/bundle-content-script.js && node ./scripts/build-extension.js && node ./scripts/package-extension.js
